serviceNotes.engine oil: M V8: shorter oil intervals than standard 5 Series; track use ~8,000 km.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Eight plugs; high-performance interval—confirm M supplement (~45,000–60,000 km).
serviceNotes.SMG gearbox fluid: E39 M5 with SMG: hydraulic/fluid service ~60,000 km for shift quality.
serviceNotes.valve adjustment: Solid lifter V8; verify valve clearance interval in M maintenance table.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 (S62) — Oil Service 15,000 km / 12 months EU; REC 8,000 km track use
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — microfilter 30,000 km per M schedule
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — engine air filter 30,000 km per M supplement
serviceSources.spark plugs: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 (S62) — eight spark plugs 45,000 km M interval
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km minimum
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km minimum
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — M vehicle check 30,000 km
serviceSources.SMG gearbox fluid: BMW TIS E39 M5 SMG — hydraulic/fluid service 60,000 km
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW TIS E39 M5 — six-speed manual transmission oil 60,000 km
serviceSources.differential fluids: BMW TIS E39 M5 — M limited-slip rear differential fluid 60,000 km
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E39 M5 — coolant per M schedule; REC 100,000 km preventive
serviceSources.valve adjustment: BMW TIS S62 — valve clearance inspection per M maintenance table (~50,000 km)
